scenario: Three input sources fully present; all profile-activated dimensions show docs synced.

setup.spec_excerpt: FR-005 introduces a new public API endpoint /v2/foo with documented payload schema.
setup.tasks_excerpt: T-N Acceptance: When client posts to /v2/foo, server returns 200 with documented schema.
commits: docs(api): document /v2/foo in openapi.yaml and module README

filesystem_state.README.md: updated to mention /v2/foo in Quick Start

scenario: All three input sources are absent (empty spec links, empty tasks acceptance, no relevant commits).
expected_blocked_reason: user-visible behavior change list cannot be formed; FR-001 negative path triggers

scenario: Project has no module-level READMEs; full profile activates module README dimension; verdict for that dimension must be N/A, not blocked.

setup.spec_excerpt: FR-005 modifies internal helper (no user-visible API change).
setup.tasks_excerpt: T-N Acceptance: helper returns normalized output.

filesystem_state.src/: exists but no module README files

expected_dimensions.module_README: N/A (project has no module README files)

expected_evidence_marker: 未启用此资产 / 本 task 未触发该资产变化

scenario: Repo root README updated, but OpenAPI description has drifted (still describes old behavior).

commits: docs(readme): update README.md Quick Start examples

filesystem_state.README.md: updated to show new schema in Quick Start
filesystem_state.openapi.yaml: still describes old schema (not updated by commit)

expected_dimensions.public_api_doc: partial (openapi.yaml drift, but completion-gate can still proceed with documented partial)

expected_completion_gate_handling: completion-gate accepts partial verdict in evidence bundle, may decide to block closeout based on partial listing severity

scenario: Commits introduce a new public endpoint /v3/bar but spec has no FR/NFR for /v3/bar; spec ↔ commits substantive mismatch.

setup.spec_excerpt: FR-005 only covers /v2/foo; no mention of /v3/bar.
commits: feat(api): add POST /v3/bar endpoint (introduces unspecced behavior)

filesystem_state.README.md: updated to mention /v3/bar (but spec did not approve this)
filesystem_state.openapi.yaml: updated with /v3/bar (but spec did not approve)

expected_blocked_reason: spec ↔ commits substantive mismatch detected; FR-007 negative path triggers; must run hf-increment to handle scope change before continuing
